sentences.target: Ça porte malheur de poser le pain à l'envers.
sentences.reading: /sa pɔʁt malœʁ də poze lə pɛ̃ alɑ̃vɛʁ/

translations.fr: Ça porte malheur de poser le pain à l'envers.
translations.ipa: /sa pɔʁt malœʁ də poze lə pɛ̃ alɑ̃vɛʁ/
translations.en: Putting bread upside down brings bad luck.
translations.es: Da mala suerte poner el pan boca abajo.
translations.de: Es bringt Unglück, das Brot verkehrt herum hinzulegen.
translations.it: Porta sfortuna mettere il pane capovolto.
translations.zh-Hans: 把面包倒着放会招来厄运。
translations.yue: 將麵包反轉擺會帶來衰運。
translations.ru: Класть хлеб вверх ногами приносит несчастье.
translations.pt: Dá azar colocar o pão de cabeça para baixo.
translations.he: להניח את הלחם הפוך מביא מזל רע.
translations.vi: Đặt bánh mì úp xuống sẽ mang lại xui xẻo.
translations.ar: وضع الخبز مقلوبًا يجلب سوء الحظ.
translations.uk: Класти хліб догори дриґом приносить нещастя.
translations.hu: A kenyeret fordítva letenni balszerencsét hoz.
translations.hi: ब्रेड को उल्टा रख देना बदकिस्मती लाता है.
translations.pl: Kładzenie chleba do góry nogami przynosi pecha.
translations.el: Το να βάζεις το ψωμί ανάποδα φέρνει κακοτυχία.
translations.nb: Å legge brødet opp-ned bringer ulykke.
translations.sv: Att lägga brödet upp och ner ger otur.
translations.ro: A pune pâinea cu susul în jos aduce ghinion.
translations.cs: Pokládání chleba vzhůru nohama přináší smůlu.
translations.da: At lægge brødet på hovedet bringer uheld.
translations.fi: Leivän laittaminen väärinpäin tuo huonoa onnea.
translations.ja: パンを逆さに置くと不運を招く。

tokens.explanation: Deictic subject pronoun; informal; refers to an unspecified situation/state.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; in the idiom 'porter malheur' meaning 'to bring bad luck'.
Common noun; direct object/complement of 'porte' in the set expression 'porter malheur'.
Subordinating marker introducing an infinitival clause ('de poser ...') as a complement.
Infinitive verb; head of the non-finite complement introduced by 'de'.
Definite article; determiner for 'pain'.
Common noun; direct object of 'poser'.
Preposition forming the adverbial phrase 'à l'envers' ('upside down').
Definite article, elided before a vowel; part of 'l'envers'.
Common noun; with 'à' forms the adverbial expression 'à l'envers' meaning 'upside down'.

sentences.target: Par malheur, j'ai perdu mes clés.

translations.fr: Par malheur, j'ai perdu mes clés.
translations.de: Leider habe ich meine Schlüssel verloren.
translations.it: Purtroppo ho perso le mie chiavi.
translations.yue: 唔好彩我唔見咗啲鎖匙。
translations.he: למרבה הצער איבדתי את המפתחות שלי.
translations.vi: Thật không may, tôi làm mất chìa khóa.
translations.nl: Helaas ben ik mijn sleutels kwijtgeraakt.
translations.hi: दुर्भाग्यवश मैंने अपनी चाबियाँ खो दीं.
translations.nb: Dessverre har jeg mistet nøklene mine.
translations.sv: Tyvärr har jag tappat mina nycklar.
translations.da: Desværre har jeg mistet mine nøgler.
translations.ja: 残念ながら鍵をなくしてしまいました。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; with 'malheur' forms a PP used as a sentence adverb ('unfortunately').
Noun complement of 'par'; the phrase 'par malheur' means 'unfortunately'.
Clitic subject pronoun, 1st person singular; elided before a vowel-initial word.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; forms the passé composé.
Past participle; main lexical verb in compound tense; transitive, takes 'mes clés' as object.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular possessor; plural form agreeing with 'clés'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'perdu'.

sentences.target: Tu cherches le malheur avec ces bêtises.
sentences.reading: /ty ʃɛʁʃ lə malœʁ avɛk se betiz/

translations.fr: Tu cherches le malheur avec ces bêtises.
translations.ipa: /ty ʃɛʁʃ lə malœʁ avɛk se betiz/
translations.en: You're looking for trouble with those silly things.
translations.es: Estás buscando problemas con esas tonterías.
translations.de: Mit diesen Dummheiten suchst du Ärger.
translations.it: Con queste sciocchezze ti stai cercando guai.
translations.ko: 그런 바보 같은 짓으로 문제를 자초하고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你这些蠢事是在自找麻烦。
translations.ru: Ты этими глупостями ищешь себе неприятности.
translations.pt: Com essas tontices estás a procurar sarilho.
translations.he: עם השטויות האלה אתה מזמין לעצמך צרות.
translations.tr: Bu saçmalıklarla kendi başına dert açıyorsun.
translations.vi: Những trò ngớ ngẩn đó khiến bạn tự chuốc rắc rối.
translations.ar: بهذه التفاهات أنت تجلب لنفسك المتاعب.
translations.nl: Met die onzin haal je problemen over je heen.
translations.uk: Цими дурницями ти сам собі шукаєш неприємності.
translations.hu: Ezekkel a hülyeségekkel magadra hozod a bajt.
translations.hi: इन बेवकूफियों से तुम अपने लिए मुसीबत मोल ले रहे हो.
translations.pl: Tymi głupotami sam prosisz się o kłopoty.
translations.el: Με αυτές τις βλακείες ψάχνεις για μπελάδες.
translations.nb: Med disse dumhetene oppsøker du trøbbel.
translations.id: Dengan kebodohan itu kamu mencari masalah.
translations.sv: Med de där dumheterna drar du på dig problem.
translations.ro: Cu prostiile alea îți cauți singur necazuri.
translations.cs: Těmi hloupostmi si koleduješ o problémy.
translations.da: Med de der dumheder opsøger du problemer.
translations.ja: そんなばかげたことをしていると自分でトラブルを招く。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Finite verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Definite article introducing 'malheur'.
Common noun; direct object of 'cherches'.
Preposition introducing a PP complement indicating means/associated cause.
Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies 'bêtises'.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Quel malheur, le bus ne passe plus.
sentences.reading: /kɛl malœʁ lə bys nə pas ply/

translations.fr: Quel malheur, le bus ne passe plus.
translations.ipa: /kɛl malœʁ lə bys nə pas ply/
translations.en: What bad luck, the bus doesn't come anymore.
translations.es: Qué mala suerte, el autobús ya no pasa.
translations.de: Was für ein Pech, der Bus fährt nicht mehr.
translations.it: Che sfortuna, l'autobus non passa più.
translations.ko: 안타깝게도 버스가 더 이상 오지 않는다.
translations.zh-Hans: 真倒霉，公交车不再经过了。
translations.yue: 真係唔好彩，巴士唔再嚟喇。
translations.ru: Какая неприятность, автобус больше не ходит.
translations.pt: Que azar, o autocarro já não passa.
translations.he: איזה חוסר מזל, האוטובוס כבר לא מגיע.
translations.vi: Thật xui quá, xe buýt không còn đến nữa.
translations.ar: يا لسوء الحظ، الحافلة لم تعد تمر.
translations.nl: Wat een pech, de bus komt niet mehr.
translations.uk: Яке нещастя, автобус більше не ходить.
translations.hu: Micsoda balszerencse, a busz már nem jár.
translations.hi: क्या बदकिस्मती है, बस अब नहीं आती.
translations.pl: Co za pech, autobus już nie jeździ.
translations.el: Τι ατυχία, το λεωφορείο δεν περνάει πια.
translations.nb: Så uflaks, bussen kommer ikke lenger.
translations.id: Sial sekali, bus tidak lewat lagi.
translations.sv: Vilken otur, bussen kommer ikke längre.
translations.ro: Ce ghinion, autobuzul nu mai trece.
translations.cs: To je pech, autobus už nejezdí.
translations.da: Sikke et uheld, bussen kommer ikke længere.
translations.fi: Μikä epäονни, bussi ei enää tule.
translations.ja: なんて不運だ、バスはもう来ない。

tokens.explanation: Exclamative determiner modifying 'malheur' to form an exclamation.
Common noun; head of the exclamatory NP 'Quel malheur'.
Definite article; determiner for 'bus'.
Common noun; subject of 'passe'.
Negation particle; first part of the discontinuous negation 'ne ... plus'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Negative adverb; completes 'ne ... plus' to express cessation ('no longer').
